extracted_items.value: Ali Bedni Bugyal Trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: The section repeatedly refers to the trek as 'Ali Bedni Bugyal trek' and mentions 'Ali Bedni winter trek'.

extracted_items.value: alpine meadow / bugyal

evidence.quote_or_summary: Ali Bedni Bugyal is an alpine meadow... Bugyal is a Hindi word that refers to alpine pasture lands or alpine meadows that grow above around 10,500 ft and below 13,000 ft.

extracted_items.value: Uttarakhand

evidence.quote_or_summary: Ali Bedni Bugyal is an alpine meadow in the state of Uttarakhand.

extracted_items.value: Directly North of Nainital, Kausani, Almora and Gwaldam

evidence.quote_or_summary: It lies directly North of popular hill stations like Nainital, Kausani, Almora and Gwaldam.
You’ll see these meadows at an elevation range of around 10,000 ft – 11,000 ft.
The altitude ranges from 7,550 ft in Lohajung all the way to 12,550 ft.

extracted_items.value: Just south of the Nanda Devi Sanctuary

evidence.quote_or_summary: Being just south of the Nanda Devi Sanctuary, these meadows have striking views of the peaks within the sanctuary.
peaks within the sanctuary — Mt Nanda Ghunti, Mt Trishul, Maiktoli and Mrigthuni. You also see the Chaukhamba massif from these meadows.

evidence.quote_or_summary: These meadows are famous for being beautiful landmarks on the Roopkund trail.

value: Grand mountain views among meadow treks in the country

evidence.quote_or_summary: Ali Bedni Bugyal has the grandest of mountain views among the meadow treks in our country... It has vast meadows and rhododendron forests.
You witness the majesty of Mt Trishul and Mt Nanda Ghunti throughout the trek.

extracted_items.value: Vast open lands above the treeline with scenic views of mountains and valleys

evidence.quote_or_summary: These alpine meadows are always found above the treeline, so they’re vast open lands, usually with great scenic views of the mountains and valleys around them.

(6 days including the drive to and from the trek).
